name: Marvel Captain America Kids' Hooded Blanket - The Marvel Collection by Pillowfort™
description: Your child can transform into a superhero with this Marvel Captain America Kids' Hooded Blanket from The Marvel Collection by Pillowfort™. Made from soft 100% microfiber polyester, this hooded blanket features a built-in Captain America mask and matching gloves for the ultimate Avenger experience. This cozy blanket is great for snuggling and playing and helps keep your young hero warm during all of their action-packed adventures.
